SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.processmodel

Class ProcessModelResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessModelResult
public class ProcessModelResult extends Object
Structured, never-throwing result of building a multi-area ProcessModel from JSON.

This is the model-level counterpart to SimulationResult. While ProcessModel.fromJson(String) only logs per-area build failures and ProcessModel.fromJsonAndRun(String) throws when execution fails, this result object surfaces per-area SimulationResults, inter-area link warnings, and an optional run-status report so automated agents can build a plant from extracted (e.g. document- or historian-derived) JSON and degrade gracefully instead of crashing mid-pipeline.

Success Response:

{ "status": "success", "areaCount": 2, "failedAreas": [], "areaResults": { ... },
 "interAreaLinkWarnings": [], "warnings": [] }

Error Response:

{ "status": "error", "errors": [ { "code": "MISSING_AREAS", "message": "JSON must
 contain an 'areas' object" } ], "warnings": [] }
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Field Details

    • SCHEMA_VERSION

      public static final String SCHEMA_VERSION
      Schema version of the structured JSON emitted by toJson().

      private final ProcessModelResult.Status status

      private final transient ProcessModel model

  • Constructor Details

    • ProcessModelResult

      private ProcessModelResult(ProcessModelResult.Status status, ProcessModel model, Map<String,SimulationResult> areaResults, List<String> failedAreas, List<String> interAreaLinkWarnings, List<SimulationResult.ErrorDetail> errors, List<String> warnings, String runStatusJson)
      Private constructor — use the static factory methods.
      Parameters:
      status - the result status
      model - the built model (nullable on hard error)
      areaResults - per-area build results keyed by area name
      failedAreas - names of areas that failed to build
      interAreaLinkWarnings - warnings produced while wiring inter-area stream links
      errors - model-level errors
      warnings - model-level warnings
      runStatusJson - optional run-status JSON when the model was also executed (nullable)

  • Method Details

    • success

      public static ProcessModelResult success(ProcessModel model, Map<String,SimulationResult> areaResults, List<String> failedAreas, List<String> interAreaLinkWarnings, List<String> warnings, String runStatusJson)
      Creates a success result.
      Parameters:
      model - the built model
      areaResults - per-area build results keyed by area name
      failedAreas - names of areas that failed to build (may be empty)
      interAreaLinkWarnings - warnings produced while wiring inter-area stream links
      warnings - model-level warnings
      runStatusJson - optional run-status JSON when the model was executed (nullable)
      Returns:
      the success result

    • error

      public static ProcessModelResult error(String code, String message, String remediation)
      Creates a failure result with a single error.
      Parameters:
      code - error code (e.g. "MISSING_AREAS", "JSON_PARSE_ERROR")
      message - human-readable error description
      remediation - actionable fix description
      Returns:
      the failure result

    • failure

      public static ProcessModelResult failure(List<SimulationResult.ErrorDetail> errors, Map<String,SimulationResult> areaResults, List<String> failedAreas, List<String> warnings)
      Creates a failure result that still carries per-area diagnostics.
      Parameters:
      errors - model-level errors
      areaResults - per-area build results keyed by area name
      failedAreas - names of areas that failed to build
      warnings - model-level warnings
      Returns:
      the failure result

    • isSuccess

      public boolean isSuccess()
      Returns true if the model build completed successfully.
      Returns:
      true if status is SUCCESS

    • isError

      public boolean isError()
      Returns true if the model build failed.
      Returns:
      true if status is ERROR

    • getStatus

      public ProcessModelResult.Status getStatus()
      Gets the result status.
      Returns:
      the status

    • getModel

      public ProcessModel getModel()
      Gets the built ProcessModel.
      Returns:
      the model, or null if the build failed before any area was created

    • getAreaResults

      public Map<String,SimulationResult> getAreaResults()
      Gets the per-area build results.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map of area name to its SimulationResult

    • getFailedAreas

      public List<String> getFailedAreas()
      Gets the names of areas that failed to build.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of failed area names

    • getInterAreaLinkWarnings

      public List<String> getInterAreaLinkWarnings()
      Gets the warnings produced while wiring inter-area stream links.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of inter-area link warnings

    • getErrors

      public List<SimulationResult.ErrorDetail> getErrors()
      Gets the model-level errors.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of errors

    • getWarnings

      public List<String> getWarnings()
      Gets the model-level warnings.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of warnings

    • hasWarnings

      public boolean hasWarnings()
      Returns true if any warnings (model-level or inter-area) were recorded.
      Returns:
      true if warnings exist

    • getRunStatusJson

      public String getRunStatusJson()
      Gets the run-status JSON captured when the model was executed.
      Returns:
      run-status JSON string, or null when the model was built but not run

      Converts this result to a JSON object.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the model build result
